mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO forecast (ts_code, ann_date, end_date, type, p_change_min, p_change_max, net_profit_min, net_profit_max, last_parent_net, summary, change_reason) VALUES
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.annDate}, #{i.endDate}, #{i.type}, #{i.pChangeMin}, #{i.pChangeMax}, #{i.netProfitMin}, #{i.netProfitMax}, #{i.lastParentNet}, #{i.summary}, #{i.changeReason})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM forecast WHERE
(ts_code = #{i.tsCode} AND end_date = #{i.endDate} AND ann_date = #{i.annDate})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forecast WHERE ts_code = #{tsCode} AND ann_date IS NOT NULL AND ann_date != '' AND ann_date <= #{tradeDate} ORDER BY end_date DESC, ann_date DESC LIMIT 1
